Class Consumable

java.lang.Object
Consumable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bomb, Buff, Healing
public abstract class Consumable extends Object
Class file for the abstract Consumable class.

Consumables are highly customizable equipment that can affect either the player, the enemy, or both.

They are capable of serving as player/enemy buffs and player/enemy debuffs.

This class also contains a static attribute to keep track of the total Consumable objects generated.

  • Constructor Details

    • Consumable

      public Consumable(String name, String type, ImageIcon image, int maxCharges, boolean affectsHolder, boolean affectsTarget, String[] statsToEffect, int[] statValuesToEffect, int affectingTurns)
      Constructor for consumables that affect either the player or enemy
      Parameters:
      name - unique name of the consumable
      type - unique type of the consumable, assumed all types are valid
      image - image of the consumable
      maxCharges - amount of times the consumable can be used
      affectsHolder - determines whether the consumable will affect the user
      affectsTarget - determines whether the consumable will affect the target
      statsToEffect - array of stats to be affected, 1 to 1 with the int array
      statValuesToEffect - array of values that will affect the corresponding stats, 1 to 1 with the String array
      affectingTurns - amount of turns the consumable remains active

    • Consumable

      public Consumable(String name, String type, ImageIcon image, int maxCharges, String[] statsToAffectHolder, int[] statValuesToAffectHolder, String[] statsToAffectTarget, int[] statValuesToAffectTarget, int affectingTurns)
      Constructor for consumables that affect either the player or enemy
      Parameters:
      name - unique name of the consumable
      type - unique type of the consumable, assumed all types are valid
      image - image of the consumable
      maxCharges - amount of times the consumable can be used
      statsToAffectHolder - array of player stats to be affected, 1 to 1 with the statValuesToAffectPlayer array
      statValuesToAffectHolder - array of values that will affect the corresponding player stats
      statsToAffectTarget - array of enemy stats to be affected, 1 to 1 with the statValuesToAffectEnemy array
      statValuesToAffectTarget - array of values that will affect the corresponding enemy stats
      affectingTurns - amount of turns the consumable remains active

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Getter method to retrieve the consumable's unique name

      Getter method to retrieve the consumable's image
      Returns:

      Getter method to retrieve the consumable's max charges
      Returns:
      consumable's max charges

    • getChargesLeft

      public int getChargesLeft()
      Getter method to retrieve the consumable's current charges
      Returns:
      consumable's current charges

    • getPlayerConsumableDescription

      public String getPlayerConsumableDescription()
      Getter method to retrieve the consumable's effect on the player
      Returns:
      brief description the consumable's effect on the player

    • getEnemyConsumableDescription

      public String getEnemyConsumableDescription()
      Getter method to retrieve the consumable's effect on the enemy
      Returns:
      brief description the consumable's effect on the enemy

    • getAffectsHolder

      public boolean getAffectsHolder()
      Getter method to determine if the consumable affects the player
      Returns:
      consumable's ability to affect the player (true or false)

    • getAffectsTarget

      public boolean getAffectsTarget()
      Getter method to determine if the consumable affects the enemy
      Returns:
      consumable's ability to affect the enemy (true or false)

    • getIsTemporary

      public boolean getIsTemporary()
      Getter method to determine if the consumable's effects are temporary
      Returns:
      consumable's permanence (true or false)

    • getAffectingTurns

      public int getAffectingTurns()
      Getter method to determine if how many turns the consumable will remain active
      Returns:
      the total amount of turns the consumable's effects will remain actve

    • getTurnCounter

      public int getTurnCounter()
      Getter method to retrieve how many turns have elapsed since the consumable was first used
      Returns:
      amount of turns consumable has remained active

    • getTotalConsumables

      public static int getTotalConsumables()
      Static getter method for the total enemy objects constructed
      Returns:
      the current amount of enemy objects constructed

    • getStatsToAffectHolder

      public String[] getStatsToAffectHolder()
      Getter method to retrieve what stats will be affected for the player
      Returns:
      amount of turns consumable has remained active

    • getStatValuesToAffectHolder

      public int[] getStatValuesToAffectHolder()
      Getter method to retrieve how many turns have elapsed since the consumable was first used
      Returns:
      amount of turns consumable has remained active

    • getStatsToAffectTarget

      public String[] getStatsToAffectTarget()
      Getter method to retrieve how many turns have elapsed since the consumable was first used
      Returns:
      amount of turns consumable has remained active

    • getStatValuesToAffectTarget

      public int[] getStatValuesToAffectTarget()
      Getter method to retrieve how many turns have elapsed since the consumable was first used
      Returns:
      amount of turns consumable has remained active

    • useConsumable

      public abstract void useConsumable(Entity holder, Entity target)
      Abstract method to be implemented by subclasses
      Parameters:
      holder - entity object using the consumable
      target - entity object targeted by the consumable

    • useCharges

      public void useCharges()
      Method that decrements the current amount of charges of the consumable

    • countAffectingTurns

      public void countAffectingTurns(Entity holder, Entity target)
      Method to keep track of the amount of turns the consumable has remained active, once it reaches the same value as affectingTurns, it restores the stat effects
      Parameters:
      holder - entity object whose stats are to be restored
      target - entity object whose stats are to be restored

    • resetCharges

      public void resetCharges()
      Method for resetting the charges of the consumable
